project_type: Python Telegram Bot - Test/Exam Grading with OMR
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, deployed via systemd service
test_framework: Manual verification - no existing test framework in repo
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot/test_grader_bot && python -c "import bot; import config; import sheet_generator; import omr_scanner; import excel_export; print('All imports OK')"
verification_instructions: 1. Install dependencies with pip. 2. Verify all modules import without error. 3. Run sheet_generator to produce a sample answer sheet image. 4. Verify omr_scanner can process a synthetically generated filled sheet.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot/test_grader_bot. 2. pip install -r requirements.txt. 3. Create .env with BOT_TOKEN and ADMIN_ID. 4. python bot.py
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network - can install any packages. Python 3.11 available via pyenv. Target deployment: AWS free tier 2GB RAM with swap, bot must use under 120MB RAM. Use OpenCV OMR (not Tesseract) for lightweight bubble detection.
contribution_requirements: Create all files in test_grader_bot/ directory at repo root. Do NOT modify UFQ_SYSTEM_v3/ folder.
key_patterns: Existing bots use: .env for config, systemd for service management, deploy.sh for deployment scripts, async patterns, Uzbek language UI. The existing event_bot uses aiogram but this new bot uses python-telegram-bot async version as specified.
directory_structure: Repository root: UFQ_SYSTEM_v3/ (existing bot system - DO NOT TOUCH), .agents/ (task tracking). New code goes in test_grader_bot/ at root level.
